raw_items.title: Drought Grips Florida: Groundwater Levels Reach Critical Low - ZetBit
raw_items.summary: Nearly 80% of Florida faces extreme drought conditions, as NASA satellite data reveals critical low groundwater levels.The drought has severe implications for agriculture, drinking water supplies, wildlife habitats, and local economies across the state.

raw_items.title: Groundwater levels are declining rapidly worldwide | BGNES
raw_items.summary: According to a new study that analyzed millions of groundwater level measurements from 170,000 wells in more than 40 countries, many parts of the world are rapidly running out of groundwater supplies that billions of people rely on for drinking, irrigation and other needs...
